title: Fabricated Stuff
description: A modpack that remakes Actions & Stuff in Minecraft: Java Edition
body:
![title v2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ef3725d603405cd93b89f034c5166b71a686fac.png)
# About

**Fabricated Stuff** is a full modpack built for **Minecraft 1.21.4**, recreating and expanding on the original [**Action & Stuff**](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp/oreville-studios/actions--stuff-1.4/61c7a786-d7ad-49e0-a710-817121cd9795) experience from Bedrock Edition.  
It combines all the **& Stuff** resource packs — *Items & Stuff, Blocks & Stuff, Armors & Stuff, and Mobs & Stuff* — along with a carefully selected collection of additional mods and packs that enhance gameplay, visuals, and compatibility, delivering the ultimate Java Edition adaptation.

## Features

- Complete recreation of the [**Action & Stuff**](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp/oreville-studios/actions--stuff-1.4/61c7a786-d7ad-49e0-a710-817121cd9795) style across all visuals and content types.  
- Integrates all official **& Stuff** packs with handpicked complementary mods.  
- Optimized for smooth performance and stability on **Minecraft 1.21.4**.  
- Enhances visuals while keeping the vanilla gameplay feel intact.  
- Easy to set up and ready to play — no manual configuration required.  

## Installation

1. Install the pack using your preferred launcher (Recommended: Modrinth App).  
2. Launch the game — all required mods and resource packs are included.  

##  Support & Feedback

Need ideas or have compatibility issues? Let me know, Contact me via my discord account: noahain, feedback enhances support and future showings!

## Disclaimer

All textures featured in this project are **fan-made recreations** based on the visual style of the original [**Action & Stuff**](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/marketplace/pdp/oreville-studios/actions--stuff-1.4/61c7a786-d7ad-49e0-a710-817121cd9795) pack by **Oreville Studios**.  
This project is **not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Mojang, Microsoft, or Oreville Studios** in any way.  
All recreated assets were designed from scratch to replicate the **style and feel** of the original Bedrock Edition content for **Java Edition** players.
